creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
Comment on attachment 256011
patch for sysutils/backuppc4

Both patches — 256011 (sysutils/backuppc4) and 256012 (sysutils/backuppc-devel) — are still needed. I believe that patch 256011 was flagged as "obsolete" by mistake, so I’ve removed the "obsolete: flag from 256011 so both fixes can be reviewed and merged.
